subject: refactor(dashboard): reorganize sections, merge Security into Health, add Discover Phase 1
body:
- Rename tabs/ → sections/, drop "Tab" suffix from all component files/names
- Merge SecurityTab into Health as a CollapsibleSection (view-level aware)
- Move urgency/impact/debt trend charts from Health to Timeline section
- Move per-contributor urgency/impact bars from Health to Contributors section
- Add Discover Phase 1 support via new calcCodeStats() aggregation (9/11 metrics)
- Simplify useHealthData hook (removed trends + per-contributor computations)
- Rename TAB_MAPPING → TAB_SECTIONS in state.js
- Update EmbedRenderer imports and embed ID mappings
- Update CLAUDE.md, SESSION_NOTES, HISTORY, EMBED_REFERENCE docs

title: reorganize sections, merge Security into Health, add Discover Phase 1
